notes: NEW: In-app self-update - one click downloads, swaps, and relaunches; auto-rollback if anything goes wrong. Much smaller downloads - the Node+Remotion graphics runtime (~563 MB) is no longer bundled (downloads once on first graphics use) and ~200 MB of unused libraries pruned. Multi-provider text AI - planner, metadata, and chat can run on Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, or a fully local Ollama; graphics also works on Ollama-only setups. NEW Clip Inspector - deep view of any clip (description, transcript, timeline events, QC signals) on Sources, Search & Import, and the sidecar. Audio waveform sync actually runs now; multicam track placement fixed (cameras no longer stack on V1). Organize: Group into Scenes; Artlist joins Epidemic Sound for music. Reliability: AI queues dedup, timelapse runs collapse to one job, no console-window flashing on Windows, API keys moved to the OS keychain, and the Windows build is Authenticode-signed.
